title: Wireless High Availability
subtitle: Ensuring Continuous Wireless Connectivity and Controller Redundancy

items.title: Controller Redundancy
items.desc: Primary and secondary controllers provide failover protection during controller outages.

items.title: Stateful Switchover (SSO)
items.desc: Maintains client sessions and AP connectivity during active controller failure.

items.title: AP Failover
items.desc: Access Points automatically join a backup controller if the primary controller becomes unavailable.

items.title: Client Roaming Continuity
items.desc: Allows users to stay connected during controller failover events.

items.title: Mobility Groups
items.desc: Controllers share roaming and session information for uninterrupted service.
